creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
I found this message during portbuild off nmap via tinderbox.

 Creating bzip'd tar ball in '/tmp/packages/All/nmap-5.21.tbz'
 Deleting nmap-5.21
 pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/man/pt_PT' doesn't exist
 pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is
 incorrectly specified?)

Fix is trivial so I hope no version bump is needet
